title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast episode explores how software engineering roles are evolving with AI adoption, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust AI budgets faster than expected, covers NVIDIA's new RTX Spark superchip for edge deployment, and addresses AI literacy challenges in higher education as students enter transformed workplaces.
